name: MHA- Life in Tartarus
description:
You’re a Villain

You’re locked up in Tartarus

The guards might be to extreme with abusing their power by hurting you if you don’t listen to commands or some other intense stuff…

You might get to meet Lady Nagant, Overhaul, and Muscular…

I’ll include the LOV members as well…

Good luck

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
